# tailor_organization_folder (Data Source)

The organization_folder data source retrieves information about an existing organization folder by its ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the organization folder to look up.
- `organization_id` (String) The ID of the organization that contains the folder.

### Read-Only

- `has_children` (Boolean) Whether this folder contains child folders.
- `name` (String) The name of the organization folder.
- `parent_folder_id` (String) The ID of the parent folder. Null for top-level folders.
